lines.english: You are All-powerful, You are my Lord and Master.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਭੁ ਕਿਛੁ ਤੁਮ ਤੇ ਤੂੰ ਅੰਤਰਜਾਮੀ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: sabh kichh tum te toon antarajaamee |1|
lines.english: Everything comes from You; You are the Inner-knower, the Searcher of hearts. ||1||
Gauree, Fifth Mehl:
As many creatures as there are - they are all Yours.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤੇਰੀ ਸਰਣਿ ਉਧਰਹਿ ਜਨ ਕੋਟਿ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: teree saran udhareh jan kott |1| rahaau |
lines.english: Millions are saved in Your Sanctuary. ||1||Pause||
The Perfect Supreme Lord God is the Support of His humble servant.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੋ ਕਿਛੁ ਵਰਤੈ ਸਭ ਤੇਰਾ ਭਾਣਾ ॥
lines.translit: jo kichh varatai sabh teraa bhaanaa |
lines.english: Whatever happens, is all according to Your Will.
One who understands the Hukam of the Lord's Command, is absorbed in the True Lord. ||3||
By Your Grace, all sorts of comforts are obtained. ||2||
Gauree, Fifth Mehl:
upon Nanak, that he may meditate on the treasure of the Naam. ||4||66||135||
Please grant Your Grace, God, and bestow this gift

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਾ ਕੈ ਹਰਿ ਵਸਿਆ ਮਨ ਮਾਹੀ ॥
lines.translit: jaa kai har vasiaa man maahee |
lines.english: Those whose minds are filled with the Lord,

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਾ ਕੀ ਰਾਮ ਨਾਮਿ ਲਿਵ ਲਾਗੀ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: jaa kee raam naam liv laagee |1|
lines.english: by those who are lovingly absorbed in the Lord's Name. ||1||
By great good fortune, the Blessed Vision of His Darshan is obtained,

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਾ ਕੈ ਸੰਗਿ ਕਿਲਵਿਖ ਦੁਖ ਜਾਹਿ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: taa kai sang kilavikh dukh jaeh |2|
lines.english: In their company, sinful mistakes and sorrows are taken away. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਾ ਕਉ ਦੁਖੁ ਸੁਪਨੈ ਭੀ ਨਾਹੀ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: taa kau dukh supanai bhee naahee |1| rahaau |
lines.english: do not suffer pain, even in dreams. ||1||Pause||
All treasures have been placed within the minds of His humble servants.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਨ ਕੀ ਮਹਿਮਾ ਕਥੀ ਨ ਜਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: jan kee mahimaa kathee na jaae |
lines.english: The Glories of the Lord's humble servants cannot be described.
The servants of the Supreme Lord God remain absorbed in Him. ||3||
Grant Your Grace, God, and hear my prayer:
Gauree, Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਦਾਸ ਕੀ ਧੂਰਿ ਨਾਨਕ ਕਉ ਦੀਜੈ ॥੪॥੬੭॥੧੩੬॥
lines.translit: daas kee dhoor naanak kau deejai |4|67|136|
lines.english: please bless Nanak with the dust of the feet of Your slave. ||4||67||136||
Meditate, O my mind, on the One Name.
and all joy shall come to abide in your mind. ||1||
Remembering the Lord in meditation, your misfortune shall be taken away,

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੀਅ ਤੇਰੇ ਕੈ ਆਵੈ ਕਾਮ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: jeea tere kai aavai kaam |1| rahaau |
lines.english: It alone shall be of use to your soul. ||1||Pause||
Night and day, sing the Glorious Praises of the Infinite Lord,
through the Pure Mantra of the Perfect Guru. ||2||
Taste the Ambrosial Essence of this, the greatest treasure. ||3||
They alone cross over the treacherous world-ocean,
Give up other efforts, and place your faith in the Support of the One Lord.
O Nanak, upon whom the Lord casts His Glance of Grace. ||4||68||137||
I have enshrined the Lotus Feet of God within my heart.
Gauree, Fifth Mehl:
Meeting the Perfect True Guru, I am emancipated. ||1||
Sing the Glorious Praises of the Lord of the Universe, O my Siblings of Destiny.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਿਲਿ ਸਾਧੂ ਹਰਿ ਨਾਮੁ ਧਿਆਈ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: mil saadhoo har naam dhiaaee |1| rahaau |
lines.english: Joining the Holy Saints, meditate on the Lord's Name. ||1||Pause||
Meditating in remembrance on the Lord, the state of perfection is attained.
This human body, so difficult to obtain, is redeemed
when one receives the banner of the Naam from the True Guru. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਤ ਕਤ ਦੇਖਉ ਤਤ ਰਹਿਆ ਸਮਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: jat kat dekhau tat rahiaa samaae |
lines.english: Wherever I look, there I see the Lord pervading.
In the Saadh Sangat, the Company of the Holy, fear and doubt depart. ||3||
Slave Nanak has entered the Lord's Sanctuary. ||4||69||138||

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਜੀ ਕੇ ਦਰਸਨ ਕਉ ਬਲਿ ਜਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: gur jee ke darasan kau bal jaau |
lines.english: I am a sacrifice to the Blessed Vision of the Guru's Darshan.
Gauree, Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਰਿ ਕਿਰਪਾ ਲਾਗਉ ਤੇਰੀ ਸੇਵ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: kar kirapaa laagau teree sev |1| rahaau |
lines.english: show mercy to me, and commit me to Your service. ||1||Pause||
O Supreme Lord God, O Perfect Divine Guru,
Chanting and meditating on the Name of the True Guru, I live. ||1||
I enshrine His Lotus Feet within my heart.
My life is prosperous, fruitful and approved;

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨ ਤਨ ਧਨ ਗੁਰ ਪ੍ਰਾਨ ਅਧਾਰੀ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: man tan dhan gur praan adhaaree |2|
lines.english: I offer my mind, body and wealth to the Guru, the Support of the breath of life. ||2||
By great good fortune, I have obtained the dust of the feet of the Saints.
I know that the Guru, the Supreme Lord God, is near me. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਗੁਰ ਭੇਟਤ ਹਰਿ ਸਿਉ ਲਿਵ ਲਾਗੀ ॥੪॥੭੦॥੧੩੯॥
lines.translit: naanak gur bhettat har siau liv laagee |4|70|139|
lines.english: O Nanak, meeting the Guru, I have fallen in love with the Lord. ||4||70||139||
